text.title: rag-evaluation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for rag-evaluation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: RAGAS context_recall used without ground truth answers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: context_recall requires ground_truth to compute; without it the metric is unavailable. Check dataset completeness before running.

failure-mode.description: Running RAGAS evaluation of 100 samples without rate limiting.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: RAGAS faithfulness makes multiple LLM calls per sample (claim extraction + support checking); 100 samples costs $5–20 and hits rate limits if parallelized without a semaphore.

failure-mode.description: Reporting only a single-run RAGAS score without confidence intervals.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLM-as-judge scores vary ±3–5% between runs. Single-point estimates mislead stakeholders about actual quality.
